overall.description: A cinematic establishing shot of a medieval great hall illuminated by thousands of floating magical candles, with students seated at long dining tables and ghostly figures drifting through the space. The scene is rendered in a high-end game engine, featuring dramatic warm lighting against cool moonlight filtering through tall stained glass windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand dining hall with magical floating candle chandeliers

events.description: translucent ghostly figure materializes and drifts through the center aisle between dining tables
dark-robed figure enters from left side and walks along the wall

agents.ego_description: maintaining a steady elevated perspective overlooking the entire great hall from the upper gallery

notable_agents.action: translucent ghostly figure drifting slowly through the center aisle between dining tables
person in dark robes walking along the left wall toward the back of the hall

entered.detail: thousands of floating candles suspended in mid-air providing warm golden illumination throughout the hall
tall gothic arched windows with blue tinted glass showing night sky outside
large stone hearth with burning fire on the right side of the hall
rows of long wooden tables with students seated, extending the length of the hall
tall stone walls with tapestries and gothic architectural details
dark wooden ceiling beams high above the dining area

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a majestic elevated view of a gothic great hall bathed in the warm glow of thousands of floating candles. Students are seated at long wooden dining tables while translucent ghosts drift through the center aisle. A dark-robed figure walks along the left wall, and cool blue moonlight filters through tall stained glass windows on the right, contrasting with the golden candlelight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a majestic elevated perspective of a gothic great hall where warm magical light contrasts with cool lunar tones. It begins with a sweeping view of the vast space, capturing thousands of floating candles that bathe the long wooden dining tables and seated students in a golden glow. As the camera lingers, the focus shifts toward the center aisle where translucent ghosts drift through the air, while a dark-robed figure moves steadily along the left wall. The scene then emphasizes the atmospheric tension as the warm candlelight meets the cool blue moonlight filtering through the tall stained glass windows on the right.
